category_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/antfu-collective/bumpp describes version bumping, commits, tags, push, recursive monorepo support, and Conventional Commits.
source_facts.description says it is an interactive CLI that bumps version numbers.
display_name_sources: Official repository heading at https://github.com/antfu-collective/bumpp is bumpp.
docs_sources: No separate official docs site found in supplied facts; official GitHub README is the best documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official GitHub page title and README identify antfu-collective/bumpp.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/antfu-collective/bumpp lists recursive monorepo support, Conventional Commits, commit, tag, and push behavior.
